title: audit — authorization policies
description: Two policies. AuditPolicy is READ-only over HTTP — create/update/delete are all refused at the policy level (vendor observer is the only capture path; purge job is the only deletion path). AuditRetentionPolicyPolicy has full CRUD gated by the audit_retention_extended entitlement (Enterprise-only).

abilities.scope: tenant member with audit.audits.viewAny AND either the `compliance` role OR the `owner` role OR platform_admin. Regular admins do NOT see audits — compliance-role scoping is deliberate.
audit.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id AND audit.audits.view AND (compliance OR owner role) OR platform_admin
tenant member + compliance/owner role + the auditable's own view permission (e.g. viewing a Membership's audit trail requires membership.view too)
tenant member + compliance/owner role. Cross-user audit reads are compliance-officer territory only.
REFUSED. Audits only enter via the vendor `Auditable` trait's observer. There is NO write path over HTTP.
REFUSED. Audit rows are immutable. AuditObserver::updating throws NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_ROW_IMMUTABLE.
REFUSED. Only PurgeExpiredAuditsJob (via the purge service account) may delete audit rows. AuditObserver::deleting throws NOTIFICATIONS_AUDIT_ROW_DELETE_FORBIDDEN otherwise.
tenant compliance officer OR owner AND tenant has audit_export entitlement (Medium+). Enterprise + regulator export requires audit_regulator_export.

compliance officer OR owner AND ?include=raw_diff query param — the default wire response REDACTS old_values/new_values when the caller's role isn't the compliance officer. Reserved for regulator investigations.
tenant compliance officer OR owner OR platform_admin
tenant owner AND tenant has audit_retention_extended entitlement (Enterprise-only). The policy MUST carry override_reason (non-empty).
abilities.notes: One-active-policy-per-tenant constraint — refuses when tenant already has an active policy; caller must PATCH the existing policy instead.

abilities.scope: policy.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id AND tenant owner AND tenant has audit_retention_extended entitlement

tenant owner. Soft-delete only — sets deleted_at + resets retention_years to config default via observer. AuditObserver preserves the policy history so the compliance trail retains what was overridden and why.
